name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the potatoes and onion.
2. Let stand for 15 minutes, then pour off the liquid.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except oil) to the potato mixture and mix well.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the potato mixture into the hot oil.
6. Fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
7. Remove the pancakes to paper towels to drain excess oil.
8. Serve.
